meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.21 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-07-01] #331 dotted-letter composition over a decomposed 〔…〕 accent span (§6.19 / Annex A). Sanitize keeps the tortoiseshell brackets, so the whole 〔Mīhr〕 is the reclaimed run; the h composes to ḥ (U+1E25) and the brackets and macron ī survive verbatim → 〔Mīḥr〕. Demonstrates that reclaim spans the entire bracketed run.
